calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Debra D. Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California, a Public Corp.,
Plaintiff's witness: Tracey McCormick, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and Declaration in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Pamela Jane Stevens as follows:
Principal $226,876.00
Waived Fees and Costs
Judgment signed in open court.
